use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING PATIENTS WITH GASTRIC RETENTIVE DOSAGE FORM
MANAGEMENT OF ACUTE PAIN IN PATIENTS REQUIRING OPIOID ANALGESIA

indications.text:
XARTEMIS XR is indicated for the management of acute pain severe enough to require opioid
treatment and for which alternative treatment options are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
Because of the risks of addiction, abuse, and misuse with opioids, even at recommended doses [see

XARTEMIS XR is indicated for the management of acute pain severe enough to require opioid
treatment and for which alternative treatment options are inadequate.
Reference ID: 3462636
